description: folk is an all-in-one CRM that connects to LinkedIn and other platforms, enriches contacts in one click, and automates outreach for sales and partnership teams.
overview: folk is a lightweight CRM that captures and enriches contacts from LinkedIn and other sources in one click, with messaging, sequences, dashboards, and pipeline management.
what_is: folk is a sales CRM that simplifies lead management and outreach. It connects to LinkedIn and several other platforms and enriches contact data in a click, so building and maintaining a pipeline takes less manual work.

It adds automated messaging, sequences, dashboards, and pipeline views, and fits sales teams, agencies, startups, and partnership teams that need fast lead capture and personalized outreach. Enrichment and AI-assisted follow-ups mean value shows up quickly.

folk sits in the GTM stack by combining CRM functions with email, social, and enrichment tools. It is not built for complex project management or ERP; it keeps the sales process connected and data-driven.
